calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-15-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: J. Murphy, Court Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840

Joanna Kozubal, Esq., for the Plaintiff Wilfred Wong.
Witness Kinyra Louie sworn and examined of behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by Defendant Lawrence Wong.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 221 26th Avenue, APT 4, San Francisco, California 94121.
Damages $0
Holdover damages $5600.00
Pre-judgment interest $0
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $395.00
For a Total Judgment of $5,995.00
Judgment signed in open court.

UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Jun-15-2015 Assigned To Trial Court
